Package database

package database
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    addEntryToTable
    This class is responsible for adding entries to a specified table in the database.
    DB
    Utility class for obtaining database connections.
    editEntryInTable
    This class is responsible for editing entries in a specified table in the database.
    EmployeeData
    Class for retrieving employee data from the database.
    Employees
    Class representing an employee in the system.
    InventoryItem
    Class representing an inventory item in the system.
    InventoryItemData
    Class for retrieving inventory item data from the database.
    InventoryMenu
    Class representing the relationship between inventory items and menu items in the system.
    InventoryMenuData
    Class for retrieving inventory-menu relationship data from the database.
    MenuItem
    Class representing a menu item in the system.
    MenuItemData
    Class for retrieving menu item data from the database.
    MenuItemTopping
    Class representing the relationship between menu items and their toppings in the system.
    MenuItemToppingData
    Class for retrieving menu item topping data from the database.
    OrderItem
    Class representing an order item in the system.
    OrderItemData
    Class for retrieving order item data from the database.
    Orders
    Class representing an order in the system.
    OrdersData
    Class for retrieving order data from the database.
    OrderTrendsData
    Class for retrieving order trends data from the database.
    OrderTrendsData.TrendResult
     
    XReportData
     
    XReportData.HourRow
     
    ZReportData
    Generates the Z Report for the end of the day.
    ZReportData.PaymentTotal
    Calculates the different types of payments.
    ZReportData.ZReportResult
    Class to hold all the data for the Z report, including total orders, total sales, average order, and totals by payment method.
